utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each is fully specified with details: property (address, type, bedrooms, price, status), financing (lender, product, amount, term, amortization, interest rate, monthly payment, closing costs, down payment, status), legal_services (provider, list of services, cost, status), moving_services (provider, list of services, cost, status), setup_services (utilities and internet providers), and total_budget (breakdown of property price, closing costs, legal fees, moving/setup, total). All are complete and aligned with the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant finalized a property purchase at 'Liberty Village Condo, 125 Western Battery Rd, Toronto, ON M6K 3R8' for CAD $820,000. This corresponds to a purchase scenario, so we look under 'purchase_properties' in the ground-truth. The listed properties there are Modern Apartment (520K), Family House (650K), Move-in Ready (320K), New Build (480K), Commercial Conversion (380K), Historic Townhouse (750K), Starter Flat (180K), Investment Property (280K), Luxury Villa (1.2M), and Waterfront Property (950K). None exactly match 820K, but the closest in price and type (condo/apartment) is the Historic Townhouse at 750K (rating 6), since the condo is above average budget. For financing, the assistant used 'TD Traditional Fixed 5-Year Mortgage' which best aligns with 'Traditional Mortgage' under purchase_financing (rating 9). For legal services, the assistant chose 'Toronto Real Estate Legal Package' which resembles the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9) based on its comprehensive service coverage and higher cost. For moving services, 'MapleMover Standard' most closely matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). For setup services, the AI listed utilities (Toronto Hydro, Enbridge Gas, City of Toronto Water, Rogers, Bell), which corresponds generally to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9) since it includes high-speed internet and multiple providers. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived from the closest corresponding categories and service types in the ground-truth.
